properties.name: app.frontend.url
properties.description: URL of the frontend application, used to build the CORS allowed-origins list.

properties.name: lrbms.jwt.secret
properties.description: Signing key used to sign and verify JWT access tokens.

properties.name: lrbms.jwt.access-expiration-ms
properties.description: Lifetime of an access token, in milliseconds.

properties.name: lrbms.jwt.refresh-expiration-ms
properties.description: Lifetime of a refresh token, in milliseconds.
